keyPoints: Provides a dedicated Continuous Delivery (CD) platform engineered to an automated delivery manager designed to orchestrate progressive, multi-stage application releases to GKE and Cloud Run..
Integrates Cloud Deploy capabilities directly into multi-tier cloud architectures, serving as a key component of the DevOps Continuous Integration and Application Delivery portfolio.
Encourages standard interface structures (REST APIs, Client SDKs, or console controls) to facilitate rapid cloud resource provisioning.
Automates software builds, containerization, and deployments using declaration files (YAML/JSON).
Supports release automation with built-in progressive rollout strategies (canary, blue-green, and rolling upgrades).
Secures the software supply chain by scanning dependencies, code, and container images for known vulnerabilities.
Optimizes Cloud Deploy performance through automated platform scaling and resource balancing.
Enables resource segregation, logical naming conventions, and tag-based configuration policies for Cloud Deploy.
Integrates with VPC routing and private service access architectures to secure communication tunnels.
Governs access to Cloud Deploy using standard IAM roles (e.g. roles/deploy.admin and roles/deploy.viewer) for fine-grained permissions.
Supports audit logging to record administrative actions and verify API configuration modifications for compliance reports.
Secures operational payloads using encryption at rest (Google-managed or Customer-Managed Keys via KMS) and SSL/TLS in transit.
Offers regional and multi-regional configuration options, duplicating service state across multiple zones to sustain outage events.
Enforces API quotas and rate limits programmatically to prevent resource starvation and noisy-neighbor interference.
Provides service recovery tools, regular status logs, and high-availability SLAs matching enterprise uptime goals.
Billed based on resource metrics (e.g., operations count, active connections, or gigabytes stored) allowing cost optimization.
Integrates with Cloud Monitoring and Cloud Logging to enable real-time alerting, metrics tracking, and diagnostic dashboards.
Enables command line administration through the gcloud CLI tool, allowing pipeline automation and scripting.

scenarios.scenario: An enterprise wants to construct a secure architectural pattern involving Cloud Deploy that blocks public internet ingress and enforces strict access restrictions.
scenarios.solution: Deploy the Cloud Deploy resource inside a VPC Service Control perimeter, routing connections privately using Serverless VPC connectors or internal gateways, and assign permissions using IAM roles.

scenarios.scenario: A development team needs to build automated CI/CD configurations that configure and audit Cloud Deploy operations on a regular basis while tracking costs.
scenarios.solution: Use Cloud Build scripts executing 'gcloud' commands to provision the Cloud Deploy resources, enable Cloud Audit Logs, and configure budget notifications at the project folder level.

commands.description: Create or configure a new Cloud Deploy resource
commands.command:
gcloud deploy delivery-pipelines create prod-deploy-resource \
  --region=us-central1 \
  --description="Production Cloud Deploy Resource"

commands.description: List active Cloud Deploy instances and query configuration states
commands.command: gcloud deploy delivery-pipelines list --format="table(name, state, updateTime)"
